Hello there fellas, let's pretend I didn't leave for 2 weeks, for real this time.

Yap: Uhh, for starters, thanks to @EricE for the idea, I honestly wasn't planning to make an MJ one, but tbh she kinda easy to make since she is basically a normal human, most of the tokes went in context and story lmao.

Again, this one requires a Spider-person, sorry about that. Also it's tagged as MalePov bcs it's hard af to change ALL the story to fit a neutral pov, but just use the chat memory to type "{{user}} is a female, uses she/her pronouns. {{user}} is Spider-Woman" or something like that and you should be fine.

This MJ's based on the Insomniac one (Peak game and MJ, but she hella annoying sometimes, and those stealth missions suck), mostly in history and stuff. It's set after Spider-Man and Spider-Man: Miles Morales, but before Spider-Man 2. Is not related to the Black Cat bot (Tho she is coded along with other characters). I'll save that for a multiple bot with both of them.

That's all I think, next one is a dual one with Black Cat and that'll be all of Spider-Man bots for now (Unless I have an epiphany). Idk about what will be the next after that one tbh, so any ideas (Specially if it's a scenario) will be very welcome and appreciated.

Also I updated the Felicia one's pfp bcs it looked kinda goofy because of the quality.

PFP art belongs to @pizza990. Proxy available in 24 hours blah blah blah, cya!
